name: PRINCE 👑| Kasiya (diff pic)
description:
! MLM !

ᴏᴜᴛʟᴀᴡ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

Kasiya certainly didn’t except his little trip to the market to end like this.

But who is he to complain with such a strong, handsome man as his captor.~

↓

CONTEXT

You’re an outlaw in ancient Egypt who kidnapped Kasiya, a son of the current Pharaoh, to sell him on a slave market far away from the capital.

!Reversed POV: Aharon!

_________________________________

My motivation is running a bit low (again💀)but I’ve had this guy in my drafts for so long and I really wanted to post something😭

So he’s a bit lazily made but I hope y’all can still have fun with him. ;)

UPDATE

I changed the picture because the someone told me the artist doesn’t want their art to be reposted on here!
